summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GummyText TextNow/Caddy clone app. Backend APIs are 100% functional with all 23 endpoints working perfectly. Frontend authentication and dashboard loading successful, but session management issues prevent full UI testing coverage.

ui_bugs.issue: User sessions appear to expire or reset between browser automation calls, preventing continuous testing
Overlay elements prevent clicking Skip button - div intercepts pointer events

issues: Missing data-testid attributes on some key UI elements like dialer tabs

passed_tests: All 23 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Phone number display in dashboard header
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix session management issues that cause user sessions to reset during browser automation testing. Add missing data-testid attributes for better UI testing coverage. Resolve overlay click interception issues in onboarding flow.
